settings.title: Ultra Full Spectrum Outdoor Heaters™
settings.description: Enjoy deep, full-body relief with near, mid, and far infrared heat 100x stronger than most saunas to support total-body recovery—session after session.

settings.title: Removable Bench Design
settings.description: Create more space when you need it—remove one or both benches for stretching, standing, or hot yoga sessions.

settings.title: Built-In Backrests
settings.description: Every Nature Series model includes ergonomic wooden backrests to support your posture and comfort, so you can unwind without distraction.

settings.title: Spacious Interior Layout
settings.description: Thoughtfully designed with extra room to move, stretch, or lie down—because your wellness routine should never feel cramped.

settings.title: Natural Hemlock or Cedar Construction
settings.description: Crafted with 100% natural Canadian Hemlock or Red Cedar, chosen for its durability, structural integrity, and clean aesthetic.

settings.para_desc: I love this sauna. It has an amazing view. The best part is it heats up in 20 minutes, my old sauna took an hour and doesn't even get as hot as this.

We put the Outdoor Nature Sauna out by the trees in our yard, and it’s honestly the best thing we’ve done in a while. It’s just nice stepping into it, especially early in the morning or when it’s cold out. The whole thing feels solid and heats up pretty quick. I didn’t expect to use it as much as I do, but now I’m out there a few times a week.
This Medical 6 plus sauna is everything advertised and more. Very well engineered and great looking as well. Easily assembled in an hour or so. Simple to use, quiet and roomy.

The Hemlock construction is solid, durable, and I like the look of the wood with all my other interiors in our studio. It really has given the place a lift in atmosphere, and clients have even said that! I feel like it was my first step in really growing as a serious and successful business.
Reliable and Durable
Reliable and Durable

I'm impressed by its durability, and I know I will be able to keep this at my studio for a long time, which is great as it's very popular and still growing! I offer bookings for singles, and the steady income is great.
